# isVideo

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether this media item is a video, such as a TV show, video podcast, or movie.

## Declaration

```swift
var isVideo: Bool { get }
```

## Getting Media Item Info

- **title**: The title of the media item.
- **sortTitle**: The title of the media item to use when sorting.
- **artist**: Information about the artist that iTunes associates with the media item.
- **composer**: The name of the composer that iTunes associates with the media item.
- **sortComposer**: The name to use when sorting by composer.
- **rating**: The rating of the media item.
- **isRatingComputed**: A Boolean value that indicates whether iTunes computes the media item’s rating from its album rating.
- **startTime**: If nonzero, the actual time playback of the media item starts instead of 0:00 (in milliseconds).
- **stopTime**: If nonzero, the actual time playback of the media item stops versus the total time (in milliseconds).
- **album**: The album of the media item.
- **genre**: The genre of the media item, if any.
- **kind**: The kind of media item file, such as an MPEG audio file.
- **mediaKind**: The kind of media item.
- **totalTime**: The length of the media item in milliseconds.
- **trackNumber**: The position of the media item within its album.
